sentences.target: Je creuse un petit trou ici.

translations.fr: Je creuse un petit trou ici.
translations.en: I'm digging a small hole here.
translations.es: Estoy cavando un pequeño hoyo aquí.
translations.de: Ich grabe hier ein kleines Loch.
translations.it: Sto scavando un piccolo buco qui.
translations.pt: Estou cavando um pequeno buraco aqui.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đào một cái hố nhỏ ở đây.
translations.nl: Ik graaf hier een klein gat.
translations.hi: मैं यहाँ एक छोटा गड्ढा खोद रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg graver et lite hull her.
translations.id: Saya sedang menggali lubang kecil di sini.
translations.sv: Jag gräver ett litet hål här.
translations.da: Jeg graver et lille hul her.
translations.ja: ここに小さな穴を掘っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'trou'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifies 'trou'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'creuse'.
Adverb of place indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu veux creuser un trou pour le jardin.
sentences.reading: /ty vø kʁøze œ̃ tʁu puʁ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu veux creuser un trou pour le jardin.
translations.ipa: /ty vø kʁøze œ̃ tʁu puʁ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/
translations.en: Do you want to dig a hole for the garden?
translations.es: ¿Quieres cavar un hoyo en el jardín?
translations.de: Willst du ein Loch im Garten graben?
translations.it: Vuoi scavare una buca in giardino?
translations.zh-Hans: 你想在花园里挖个洞吗？
translations.ru: Ты хочешь выкопать яму в саду?
translations.pt: Você quer cavar um buraco no jardim?
translations.tr: Bahçede bir çukur kazmak ister misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có muốn đào một cái hố trong vườn không?
translations.ar: هل تريد حفر حفرة في الحديقة؟
translations.nl: Wil je een gat graven in de tuin?
translations.uk: Ти хочеш викопати яму в саду?
translations.hu: Akarsz ásni egy gödröt a kertben?
translations.hi: क्या तुम बगीचे में एक गड्ढा खोदना चाहते हो?
translations.el: Θέλεις να σκάψεις έναν λάκκο στον κήπο;
translations.nb: Vil du grave et hull i hagen?
translations.id: Apakah kamu ingin menggali lubang di taman?
translations.sv: Vill du gräva ett hål i trädgården?
translations.ro: Vrei să sapi o groapă în grădină?
translations.da: Vil du grave et hul i haven?
translations.ja: 庭に穴を掘りたいですか？

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'trou'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'creuser'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'jardin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On creuse au bord de la plage.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kʁøz o bɔʁ də la plaʒ/

translations.fr: On creuse au bord de la plage.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kʁøz o bɔʁ də la plaʒ/
translations.en: We're digging at the edge of the beach.
translations.es: Estamos cavando en la orilla de la playa.
translations.de: Wir graben am Rand des Strandes.
translations.it: Stiamo scavando sul bordo della spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在海滩边上挖沙子。
translations.pt: Estamos cavando na beira da praia.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đào ở mép bãi biển.
translations.nl: We graven aan de rand van het strand.
translations.hi: हम समुद्र तट के किनारे खोद रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi graver ved kanten av stranden.
translations.id: Kami sedang menggali di tepi pantai.
translations.sv: Vi gräver vid kanten av stranden.
translations.da: Vi graver ved kanten af stranden.
translations.ja: 私たちは砂浜の端で掘っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'au'.
Preposition linking 'bord' to its complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'plage'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de'.

sentences.target: Nous creusons près du vieux mur.

translations.fr: Nous creusons près du vieux mur.
translations.en: We are digging near the old wall.
translations.es: Estamos cavando cerca del muro viejo.
translations.de: Wir graben in der Nähe der alten Mauer.
translations.it: Stiamo scavando vicino al vecchio muro.
translations.ko: 우리는 오래된 벽 근처에서 파고 있어요.
translations.ru: Мы копаем рядом со старой стеной.
translations.pt: Estamos cavando perto do muro antigo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đào gần bức tường cũ.
translations.ar: نحن نحفر بالقرب من الجدار القديم.
translations.nl: We graven dicht bij de oude muur.
translations.hi: हम पुरानी दीवार के पास खोद रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi graver ved den gamle muren.
translations.id: Kami sedang menggali di dekat tembok tua.
translations.sv: Vi gräver nära den gamla muren.
translations.da: Vi graver ved den gamle mur.
translations.ja: 私たちは古い壁の近くで掘っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Forms the fixed prepositional locution 'près de' meaning 'near'; here introducing a proximity phrase.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition linking to 'mur'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'mur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition.
